title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log into their account even after attempting to reset the password multiple times.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending in 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button does not respond.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer updated their billing address but the system still shows the previous address.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports the mobile application crashes immediately after launching on Android devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but the amount has not been credited yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving authentication codes on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer gets an upload error when trying to change their profile picture.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Not Working
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal but the toggle option appears disabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but did not receive the confirmation email.

title: Password Reset Email Not Received
description: Customer requested a password reset but never received the reset email.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: Customer reports the dashboard takes more than 20 seconds to load after login.

title: Duplicate Charges on Account
description: Customer noticed two identical charges for the same subscription payment.

title: Notification Settings Not Saving
description: Customer tries to disable email notifications but the settings revert after refresh.

title: Error While Updating Payment Method
description: Customer receives an error when attempting to update their saved credit card details.
